Browse Bait and Tackle Banner Templates h2: Why Choose Banners.com? h4: Search ================================================== AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ================================================== h1: Custom Bait and Tackle Banners for Marina & Tackle Shop Display h2: Weather-Resistant Vinyl Bait and Tackle Banners for Outdoor Marketing Tab h2s: - Attract Fishing Enthusiasts with Custom Bait and Tackle Banners - Bait and Tackle Banner Materials for Outdoor Marine Use - Finishing Options for Weather-Resistant Tackle Shop Banners - Artwork Requirements for Bait and Tackle Banner Printing - Custom Bait and Tackle Banner Production & Turnaround Times - Payment Methods for Tackle Shop Banner Orders - Shipping Guidelines for Custom Bait and Tackle Banner Delivery - Marina & Tackle Shop Display Uses for Custom Banners h2: Order Professional Bait and Tackle Banners Today FAQ h2: Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Bait and Tackle Banners ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Custom Bait and Tackle Banners for Marina & Tackle Shop Display ## Weather-Resistant Vinyl Bait and Tackle Banners for Outdoor Marketing PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size (H x W): Quantity: Design Method Template Design Upload a File Professional Designer PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Attract Fishing Enthusiasts with Custom Bait and Tackle Banners

Make the most of your marina, tackle shop, or fishing tournament with eye-catching bait and tackle banners. From storefront displays and marina advertising to fishing tournaments and outdoor events, we can help you improve your visibility and attract more fishing enthusiasts with our professionally designed custom vinyl banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a banner that you're proud to display at your tackle shop or marina. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made bait and tackle banner.

We offer a wide selection of custom bait and tackle banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for your tackle shop opening, fishing tournament, or marina display.

Your bait and tackle banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that showcase your tackle shop branding, fishing supplies, and contact information. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA with weather-resistant materials perfect for outdoor marina and tackle shop use.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bait and Tackle Banner Materials for Outdoor Marine Use

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material for tackle shops and marinas. It has a low shine and rich color gamut that displays fishing graphics and tackle shop information clearly.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your bait and tackle banner a high-end look for professional marina displays.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material for demanding marine environments. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality in outdoor tackle shop applications.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for windy marina conditions and outdoor fishing tournament displays.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor tackle shop displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors for tackle shop windows and marina displays, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces common in marine environments.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Weather-Resistant Tackle Shop Banners

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all bait and tackle banners to increase durability in marine environments.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your tackle shop banner:

  • Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for tackle shop and marina banners.
  • All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted for maximum durability.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of your bait and tackle banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for outdoor tackle shop installations and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of your bait and tackle banner for demanding marine environments.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided tackle shop banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Bait and Tackle Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from for your tackle shop or marina banner project. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your bait and tackle banner.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight for fishing tournaments and tackle shop openings. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your tackle shop banners quickly? The express option is ideal.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option for bait and tackle banners. Free and speedy for most custom orders.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush for your marina or tackle shop banner, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Methods for Tackle Shop Banner Orders

All bait and tackle banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your tackle shop banner order is put into production.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your bait and tackle banner order.

For more information on check orders for your tackle shop or marina banner project, please contact our customer service team.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Bait and Tackle Banner Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping your tackle shop or marina banners, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your bait and tackle banner order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your tackle shop banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large bait and tackle banner orders.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for your tackle shop banner delivery:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping for your bait and tackle banner, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments of tackle shop banners, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Marina & Tackle Shop Display Uses for Custom Banners

We print thousands of bait and tackle banners each year. If you need inspiration for designing your tackle shop or marina banner, explore some popular ways below for how our customers use vinyl banners in the fishing and marine industry.

Tackle Shops and Bait Stores

  • Grand opening announcements
  • Storefront advertising for fishing supplies
  • Seasonal fishing gear promotions
  • Live bait availability displays

Marinas and Boat Launches

  • Marina service advertising
  • Boat launch fee displays
  • Marina facility information
  • Fuel dock promotions

Fishing Tournaments and Events

  • Tournament sponsor recognition
  • Registration and check-in displays
  • Prize and award announcements
  • Event schedule displays

Charter Fishing Services

  • Charter boat advertising
  • Fishing guide promotions
  • Seasonal fishing trip offers
  • Contact information displays

Fishing Equipment Sales

  • Equipment sale announcements
  • New product introductions
  • Brand partnership displays
  • Clearance sale promotions
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Bait and Tackle Banner Printing

The file that prints best for your tackle shop banner is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files for your bait and tackle banner, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your tackle shop banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your bait and tackle banner artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your tackle shop banner project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific bait and tackle banner. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Professional Bait and Tackle Banners Today

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color bait and tackle banners take your marina, tackle shop, or fishing tournament to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability perfect for marine environments.

Looking for something more specific? We can customize your tackle shop banner order through a custom quote! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders for fishing tournaments or marina displays.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you with your bait and tackle banner project.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Bait and Tackle Banners

What banner material works best for outdoor tackle shop displays?

We recommend our 13 oz matte or gloss vinyl banners for most tackle shop applications. For extremely windy marina locations, our mesh banners with 37% airflow are ideal. For the most demanding marine environments, our 18 oz vinyl provides maximum durability.

Can I display fishing tournament sponsor logos on my banner?

Absolutely! Our high-resolution printing process produces crisp, vibrant sponsor logos and fishing brand graphics. You can upload multiple logo files or work with our designers to incorporate all tournament sponsors.

How long will my tackle shop banner last outdoors?

Our vinyl bait and tackle banners are designed for long-term outdoor use. With proper installation and care, they typically last 3-5 years in marine environments. Factors like sun exposure, wind, and salt air can affect longevity.

What size banner works best for marina displays?

Popular sizes for marina and tackle shop displays include 3'x6', 4'x8', and 6'x10'. The best size depends on your display location and viewing distance. Our team can help you choose the optimal dimensions for maximum visibility.

Do you offer rush production for fishing tournament banners?

Yes! We offer 1-day priority production for urgent tackle shop and tournament banner needs. Emergency same-day rushes may be available - please contact customer service for availability and pricing.

Can I get my tackle shop banner printed double-sided?

Yes, we offer double-sided printing for bait and tackle banners up to 150 square feet. This option is perfect for banners that will be viewed from both sides, such as hanging marina displays.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
